summary: Full backend + frontend testing complete for Panda Farm House landing page. All 9 pytest backend tests passed (health, root, contact CRUD across general/visit/produce, invalid email 422, missing fields 422, list newest-first, list limit). All 15 frontend E2E flows passed (hero headline, nav scroll, service cards, hero CTAs, gallery lightbox open/next/prev/close, reviews 4.8/5, animated stats 500+/20+/100%/10+, visit section address+phone+hours+google-map iframe, floating WA (wa.me/918328830796) + Call (tel:+919861448443) + Back-to-top visibility and behavior, contact form empty-state error toast, all 3 submit buttons (general/visit/produce) POST successfully to /api/contact with form reset, mobile nav toggle at 390x844). All 3 frontend-submitted contacts verified persisted in MongoDB with correct inquiry_type via GET /api/contact.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: create_contact_submission stores created_at as ISO string but response model expects datetime — fine because the response is built from the ContactSubmission instance in memory (doc mutation happens after). Non-issue.
Toast text not asserted for success toasts in tests because sonner removes toasts by the time input reset check runs; form reset is a stronger success signal and was verified.

EMERGENT_EMAIL_KEY, EMAIL_FROM_NAME, CONTACT_RECIPIENT_EMAIL are required — server.py uses os.environ['KEY'] which will crash on cold start if missing. Consider defensive defaults or explicit startup validation with a clearer error. Currently all keys are present in backend/.env so this works.
Hero.jsx button padding inconsistency: 'Contact Us' uses pl-7 pr-3 py-3 vs 'Visit Farm' uses px-7 py-4 — minor visual asymmetry.
seed_data_creation: Created 7 TEST-prefixed and playwright-* contact submissions in MongoDB during testing. These are safe to leave as they are user submissions and identifiable by 'TEST' / 'playwright-' prefixes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py at /app/backend/tests covers all contact endpoints; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Public URL: https://panda-farm-house.preview.emergentagent.com. Email is proxied via Emergent Resend — emails may or may not actually deliver but email_sent flag reflects Resend API success; API always returns 200 and persists regardless.
